mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.id_device) FROM c_ai_device d WHERE d.fg_active = '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log ucl WHERE ucl.fg_active = '1' AND ucl.id_device = d.id_device
)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_device d WHERE d.fg_active = '1'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log ucl LEFT JOIN c_ai_device d ON d.id_device = ucl.id_device AND d.fg_active = '1' WHERE ucl.fg_active = '1' AND d.id_device IS NOT NULL AND ucl.status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log ucl LEFT JOIN c_ai_device d ON d.id_device = ucl.id_device AND d.fg_active = '1' WHERE ucl.fg_active = '1' AND d.id_device IS NOT NULL
SELECT id_region AS id, na_region AS name, sd_region_type AS type, id_parent AS parentId FROM c_ai_region WHERE fg_active = '1' AND sd_status = '1' ORDER BY sort_order, na_region
